title: KB Artifact Linked
description: Emitted by `kb link <plan> --session <id>` when a session artifact is associated with a plan entry. Enables downstream consumers (deer-flow, hearth-loom) to track which sessions contributed evidence to which plans.

entry_id.description: UUID v7 of the vault plan entry

artifact_uri.description: URI of the linked artifact, e.g. tengine-session://<dir>, bd://<bead_id>

session.description: Session identifier (bare ID, not URI) — populated when artifact_type=session

wave.description: Optional wave label (e.g. 'W1-A') for linking to a specific dispatch wave

project.description: Project namespace of the plan entry
